subcodes.first_line: Be assured that in the state of slumber, the soul's condition is akin to that of the sun in its station; though it has not departed from the body, yet through its light, the realms of the celestial kingdom are beheld [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فایقن ان فی النوم مثل الروح مثل الشمس فی مقامها لم یخرج من الجسم بل بنوره یشاهد ملکوت السموات
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
